summary: Iteration 24 - Multiple New Features Testing Complete. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verification successful - District Fees Config, Service Bookings sync, Razorpay Payments all visible and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: GZIP compression middleware properly configured with minimum_size=500
District fees endpoint correctly stores per-district delivery charges in MongoDB settings collection
Service bookings sync is idempotent - uses booking_id to prevent duplicates
CRM Razorpay payments endpoint properly handles both Razorpay API and local fallback
Image optimization uses Pillow to convert to WebP with quality adjustment for size control
All new endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - tested existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple features tested in iteration 24. Key endpoints: GET /api/admin/district-fees (get editable fees), PUT /api/shop/bihar-districts/fees (update fees), POST /api/admin/sync-service-bookings (sync service bookings to orders), GET /api/crm/razorpay-payments (CRM payments), POST /api/upload/optimize-image (WebP conversion). GZIP middleware active. District Fees editor visible in admin shop page with per-district inputs. Service Bookings sync button visible in Orders tab alongside Razorpay Payments sync.

backend_apis.GET /api/admin/district-fees: PASSED - Returns districts list, current fees, default fees
backend_apis.PUT /api/shop/bihar-districts/fees: PASSED - Updates district delivery fees, validates empty payload
backend_apis.POST /api/admin/sync-service-bookings: PASSED - Syncs paid bookings to orders, idempotent
backend_apis.GET /api/crm/razorpay-payments: PASSED - Returns formatted payments from Razorpay or local DB
backend_apis.POST /api/upload/optimize-image: PASSED - Converts to WebP, returns data_url and compression stats
backend_apis.GET /api/uploads/{filename}: PASSED - Serves optimized images with caching headers
backend_apis.GET /api/shop/bihar-districts: PASSED - Returns all Bihar districts with delivery fees

frontend_ui.Admin login: PASSED - OTP flow working with fallback 131993
frontend_ui.Admin Dashboard: PASSED - Shows stats cards and navigation
frontend_ui.Book Service Price Config: PASSED - Input field and Update Price button visible
frontend_ui.District Delivery Fees section: PASSED - Editable per-district fees with Save All Fees button
frontend_ui.Products tab: PASSED - Shows product list with actions
frontend_ui.Orders tab: PASSED - Shows orders with status management
frontend_ui.Razorpay Payments sync section: PASSED - Sync button visible with description
frontend_ui.Service Bookings sync section: PASSED - Sync button visible with description

whatsapp_auto_order_confirmation.note: WhatsApp API credentials not set in backend/.env (WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID, WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN are empty). Code path exists but cannot verify actual message delivery.

lazy_load_razorpay.note: Razorpay script lazy loading mentioned in requirements. Frontend code should load Razorpay SDK only when needed for checkout.

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as designed
